ClientConnect
Returns score strings for eventlog etc.
Sets the following results for the current scores entities.
Returns the forced handicap of the player.
Returns the voluntary handicap of the player.
Initializes handicap to its default value.
Sets the forced handicap of the player.
Invite a player to join in a minigame.
Sets the team of the player with all sanity checks.
Adds a score to the player's scores.
Attaches a PlayerScore entity to a player.
Initialize the score of this player if needed.
Sets the team of the player.
Detaches a PlayerScore entity from the player.
Sets the player's score to the score parameter.
Sorts the players and stores their place in the given field, starting with.
Clear ALL scores (for ready-restart).
Called when a client spawns in the server.
Join an existing minigame session.
Create a new minigame session.
Hook that is called after the player has touched an item.
Returns the total handicap of the player.
Updates the handicap of all players.
Called when the player connects or when they change their color with the "color" command.
Adds a score to both the player and the team.
Moves player to the specified team.
Assigns the given player to a team that will make the game most balanced.
Switches a bot from one team to another if teams are not balanced.
Prints the scores to the console of a player.
